speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khushi ko maar kar main unka faisla maan rahi hoon
text: Apni khushi ko maar kar main unka faisla maan rahi hoon. Papa ne bina mujhse pooche mera rishta ek badi age ke aadmi se tay kar diya hai kyunki unhe mera inter-caste pyaar manzoor nahi. Divorcee hone ka stigma aur bojh pehle hi mere kandho par hai, main bacchon ke future aur unki izzat ke samne aur kuch bol nahi saki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring Seeker's relational preservation and sacrifice as an invitation to share more without asking questions due to stigma cue.
text: Papa ki baat rakhne aur parivaar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye aap apni khushi ko maar kar unka faisla maan rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine awaz uthayi toh phir wahi baat shuru ho jayegi. Main nahi chahti ki log kya kahenge ki baatein humare ghar ko aur tode. Mere bacchon par in sab kalesh ka asar nahi padna chahiye, unki life already meri pehli shaadi se disturb hui thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly naming the implied fear that asserting herself will harm her children and home environment.
text: Aapko darr hai ki agar aapne kuch kaha toh samaj ke taane aur bahar ki baatein aapke bacchon aur is bache-khuche ghar ka mahol bhi kharab kar dengi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek baar toh maine himmat ki thi society ke rules todne ki, par ab sach me wo energy nahi bachi. Biradari me papa ko jawab dena padta hai har baat ka. Unki 'izzat' ka sawal beech me aa jata hai baar baar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing gently into the Seeker's internal experience when faced with the pressure of family honor.
text: Jab sab 'izzat' aur biradari ka hawala dete hain, toh uss waqt aapko khud ke future aur akelepan ke baare mein kya mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apni khushi ko maar kar
text: Lagta hai ki main bas ek tool ban ke reh gayi hu. Mere inter-caste waale pyaar ke baare mein soch kar lagta tha ki shaayad ab life better hogi. Par bacchon ko dekhti hu toh lagta hai, apni khushi ko maar kar unhe ek secure ghar dena zyada zaruri hai. Main khudgargz nahi ban sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the continuous endurance over time for the sake of the children's security.
text: Aap lagatar bacchon ke aane wale waqt ko surakshit karne ke baare me soch rahi hain, chahe uske liye aapko pichle saare sapne bhulane pade.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur kya option hai? Divorcee ko society waise bhi kaunsa accept karti hai aasaani se. Papa kehte hain ki ek settled ghar mil raha hai badle mein, aur aadmi ki umar badi hone se koi farq nahi padta agar bacchon ka kharcha utha lega toh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the role and duty framework the Seeker is trapped within.
text: Ek maa hone ke farz aur beti ki duty nibhane ke bojh mein aap khud ki zarooraton ko bilkul piche rakh rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut thakan hoti hai sach kahu toh. Kabhi kabhi sans lena bhari lagta hai. Aisa lagta hai ki charo taraf ek aisi diwaar hai jisse cross karungi toh sirf ghar walon ki nafrat milegi mujhe aur bacchon ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific emotional consequence of Relational Preservation combined with Rishta pressure.
text: Lagta hai jaise aap chaaro taraf se is izzat aur farz ke jaal mein phans gayi hain, aur bilkul akela aur majboor mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, majboori hi toh hai yeh. Kisi ko is baat se sach me koi farq nahi padta ki mere dil mein kya chal raha hai, bas biradari mein tasveer theek dikhni chahiye sabko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the Seeker's feeling of being unseen, connecting it to the structural reality of maintaining family honor in the Hindi belt.
text: Yeh majboori aur akelapan mehsoos karna bilkul samajh aata hai. Humare yahan kai baar parivaar ki izzat ke naam par ek maa se bahut badi qurbani maang li jaati hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki aapke apne ahsaason ki koi ahmiyat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khushi ko maar kar
text: Agar meri ahmiyat hoti toh bina pooche aisa faisla thodi le lete papa. Agar main in sab par gussa karungi ya bahas karungi, toh wahi baat uthegi ki apni khushi ko maar kar shanti kyu nahi banaye rakhti main. Taane mujhe hi milenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the Seeker's experience as a single mother facing societal pressures.
text: Main samajh sakti hoon. Single mothers ki zindagi mein yeh pattern bahut common hai—sirf aapke sath nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj ko bas parivaar aur rishton ki perfect tasveer dekhni hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi perfect tasveer ke chakkar me main andar se ghut rahi hu. Mujhe sach me darr lagta hai ki isi tension ke sath jeeti rahi toh ek din dimaag se sab control na chhut jaye. Bacchon ki dekhbhal kaun karega phir?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the implied fear of mental breakdown due to the continuous suppression of feelings.
text: Aapko andar hi andar yeh ghutan is hadd tak dara rahi hai ki kahin is dabav mein aap poori tarah se toot na jayein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Lekin main tootna nahi chahti, kam se kam apne bacchon ke future ke liye toh bilkul nahi. Main ab aise theek se soch nahi pa rahi... koi raasta hai kya, ab kya karoon main is situation me?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable choices that align with preserving family harmony but gently asserting space.
text: Bacchon ke bare mein soch kar aap khud ko bacha kar rakhna chahti hain, yeh bahut himmat ki baat hai. Abhi ke liye do chizein kar sakte hain: ya toh aap papa se sirf bacchon ke adjustment ke naam par thoda samay maang sakti hain is naye rishte ke pehle, ya kisi aise qaribi ristedar ko beech me bolne ko keh sakti hain jo papa ko gussa dilaye bina samjha sake. Inme se kuch theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Samay maangna shayad zyada safe rahega. Agar main bacchon ke school aur adjustment ka bahaana dekar kahungi, toh shayad papa maan jayein. Biradari mein unhe bhi toh yahi dikhana hai ki meri aurat hone ke naate sab handle ho gaya aaram se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step-by-step so it feels doable without sparking confrontation.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki akele mein papa ke paas baitho aur bahut aaram se sirf bacchon ki padhai ki chinta jatao… phir unse bolo ki is badlaav ke liye kuch mahino ka waqt chahiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye plan karo.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh thoda safe lag raha hai mujhe. Ekdum se us badi umar ke aadmi aur apne pyaar ki baat beech me nikalungi toh phir wahi bawaal aur gali-galoch hoga, izzat uchal jayegi meri wapas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the burden as a systemic issue, normalizing why it requires such cautious maneuvering.
text: Yeh soch samajh kar chalna zaruri bhi hai kyunki shadi aur rishton mein aksar saari shanti banaye rakhne ki zimmedari aurton ke kandhon par hi daal di jaati hai. Yeh aapki koi kamzori nahi, balki humare samaj ka dhancha hi aisa hai jo chup rehne ka bojh daalta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dhancha hi kharab hai sach kahu toh. Par un bachho ki guarantee bhi toh leni hai mujhe. Agar us aadmi ke paas bhej hi rahe hain, toh at least unke future ka kuch clear rahe, warna main nahi jaungi waha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the Seeker's commitment to balancing her duty towards her children's future while carving out small, necessary boundaries.
text: Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti dono farz nibhaate hue hi aap dheere-dheere apni aawaz aur zarurat ko samne rakhne ki koshish kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Apni khushi ko maar kar
text: Thodi aawaz toh rakhni padegi unke liye. Apni khushi ko maar kar hi sahi, thoda time mil jaye toh un bacchon ke sath main privately kuch toh plan out karungi aage ke expenses ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Helping the Seeker specify what concrete things she wants to secure using the time she plans to ask for.
text: Is chote se waqt mein, aap sabse pehle apne aur bacchon ke future ke liye konsi specific baat tay kar lena chahengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Unki fees aur school wagaira... main chahati hu ki wo aadmi unko bojh na samjhe aur agar aisa kuch ho bhi, toh mere paas itna control ho ki bacchon ki education par koi asar na aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep-seated fear of her children being compromised in the new setup.
text: Aane wale naye rishte ke chalte kahin unka safar na ruk jaye ya unko koi takleef ho, yeh darr aapko har waqt sata raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, pichli shadi se nikalti baar sab tut gaya tha. Society me divorcee ka thappa toh maine le liya, par us waqt bacchon ne bahut face kiya tha. Wo wapas wahi darrnahi jhel sakte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the trauma of the past experience quietly in response to the stigma cue.
text: Pichli baar ke us mushkil waqt aur thappe ke sadme ko aap bacchon ke liye dobara kisi bhi kimat par nahi aane dena chahti...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aane. Log toh bas tana marna jante hain aur mere apne log ghar ki izzat bachane me lage hain. Aapse baat karke ab thoda halka lag raha hai, koi toh is tarah samajh raha hai ki main apni taraf se kya guzaarti hu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief of relational connection amidst isolation.
text: Jab baaki sab sirf parivaar ki izzat ki fikr kar rahe hain, aise me sirf aapki aawaz aur mehnat ko kisi ka samajhna sach me zaruri tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aaj raat ko hi main papa ke paas jaungi aur aaram se time ki demand karungi. Agar time mil gaya toh shayad thoda aur sochu aage ka bina pareshan hue.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the immediate time frame she has set for taking this small step.
text: Aapne tay kar liya hai ki aaj raat hi aap bina kalesh kiye us zaroori samay ko maangne ki koshish shuru karengi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khushi ko maar kar
text: Karna hi padega, warna papa samjhenge ki maine totally surrender kar diya hai. Agar aaj bhi apni khushi ko maar kar waise hi baithi rahi toh bacchon ka aage kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Preparing the Seeker emotionally for the conversation with her father.
text: Akele mein baat karte waqt, agar situation thodi stressful lagne lage toh khud ko shaant rakhne ke liye aap kya karengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas un dono ka chehra apne dimag me rakhungi. Pata hai usse na aawaz uthegi meri, na gussa aayega aur main respectfully papa se deal kar lungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duty frame which acts as her anchor for emotional regulation.
text: Maa hone ka ehsaas aur bacchon ki chinta hi us waqt aapko gusse se bacha kar puri tarah se sanyamit banaye rakhegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Chalo ab raat hone dete hain, dekhti hu kya jawab milta hai udhar se. Kam se kam is conversation ke baad thodi clarity toh aayi ki kaise baat rakhni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by affirming her resilience and providing an open door for future support.
text: Aapne aaj bacchon ke liye jo clarity aur himmat jutayi hai, is poore bojh ke bawajood, wo sach mein bohut badi baat hai. Jab bhi mann bhari ho ya aage kuch samajh na aaye, toh bina kisi jhijhak ke yahan apni baat keh sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni azaadi kurban kar di
text: Apni azaadi kurban kar di maine bas inki baaton ke aage... Jab Papa ko mere dusre religion wale partner ke baare mein pata chala, toh unhone saaf keh diya ki ek single mother hone ke naate ab mera koi future nahi hai. Mera dil toot gaya par main khamosh rahi, kyunki khandaan ki 'izzat' aur rishtedar ka darr unke liye sabse bada hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational sacrifice to validate her helplessness without naming anger.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki parivaar ki izzat bachane ke liye aapne apne khud ke future aur pyaar dono ko peeche chhod diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur kya karti main? Ek toh pehle hi meri shaadi toot chuki hai, wo stigma alag hai. Bachhe ki poori zimmedari mujh par hai. Agar main society ke rules todti toh rishtedar humara jeena haram kar dete. Isliye beti aur maa hone ka farz nibhate huye main bas chup reh gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shorter response with soft pause to gently hold space after the stigma cue regarding her failed marriage.
text: Aapke liye yeh sab bardasht karna kitna bhari hoga, ek maa aur beti hone ke farz mein bandh kar apne haq ki baat na keh pana...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni azaadi kurban kar di
text: Bahut bhari hai sach mein. Bachhe ka chehra dekhti hoon toh lagta hai uske future ke liye sab sehna padega. Maine apni azaadi kurban kar di taaki humare khandaan pe koi daag na lage is inter-faith rishte ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the long duration of her sacrifice for her child and family.
text: Aap lagataar apni zarooraton ko nazarandaaz kar rahi hain taaki bache ki zindagi aur parivaar ka naam, dono lambe samay tak surakshit rahein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur is safar mein main poori tarah akeli pad gayi hoon. Papa ke un shabdon ne ki 'mera ab koi future nahi hai' mujhe andar tak tod diya. Kya mera koi haq nahi hai zindagi mein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing gently to explore her emotional experience beneath the duty to her father.
text: In sab baaton ke beech ek beti ke taur par jab aapne apne future ke baare mein aise shabd sune, toh aapko andar se kya mehsoos hua?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni azaadi kurban kar di
text: Bahut majboor feel kiya tha. Jaise meri pehchan bas meri failed marriage aur ek galat aurat ki reh gayi ho. Aur dusre religion ka partner hona toh unke liye gunah hai. Isliye maine apni azaadi kurban kar di bas is ghar ki shanti na tootne dene ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the implied fear of causing family disruption, mirroring the relational preservation.
text: Ghar ki shanti aur izzat par koi aanch na aaye, is darr se aapne apne rishte aur khushiyon se poori tarah kinara kar liya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kinara kar toh liya par thak chuki hoon ab is dikhawe se. Bachha bhi dekhta hai ki mummy humesha udaas rehti hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai is rishtedari aur farz ke bojh tale mera wajood hi khatam ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the feeling of being trapped within family rules, matching her expression of exhaustion.
text: Sun kar lagta hai ki aap is parivaar aur samaj ke niyamon mein puri tarah phans chuki hain, aur ekdum asahay mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi me phans gayi hoon. Society ki nazar mein main pehle hi ek problem hoon kyunki main akele bacha paal rahi hoon. Upar se inter-faith relation toh inke liye impossible cheez hai. Mere paas koi option hi nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her feelings as culturally normal for single mothers, separating her worth from the stigma.
text: Aapka yeh akelepan aur majboori bilkul samajh aata hai. Humare samaj mein ek single mother par khandaan aur rishtedaron ki izzat ka itna bojh daal diya jata hai ki aapka khud ko phansa hua mehsoos karna ekdum swabhavik hai, isme aapki koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin galti mujh mein hi nikalte hain sab. Papa ko lagta hai main unka sir neecha karwa rahi hoon. Mujhe khud se chidh hone lagti hai kabhi kabhi ki main kyun aage badhne ki himmat ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a brief systemic anecdote about the common burden on single mothers to protect family honor.
text: Single mothers ki zindagi mein yeh pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhare sath nahi ho raha, lekin koi bahar khul ke bolega nahi kyunki aurton pe izzat bachane ka darr aur farz ka bojh bahut zyada hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi izzat ka bojh hi toh mujhe ghutne pe majboor kar raha hai. Bachhe ko dekhti hoon aur darr lagta hai. Main nahi chahti ki wo is ghutan bhare ghar mein bada ho jahan uski maa ke paas apne liye kuch kehne ki bhi azaadi na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her core fear of the situation impacting her child's future.
text: Aap is baat se behad dari hui hain ki aapki majboori aur yeh dabaav bhara mahol kahin aapke bache ke mansik vikas aur bhavishya par bura asar na daale.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Uska future mere liye sabse zaroori hai, uske liye main sab sah lungi. Par samajh nahi aa raha ki ab main aage kya karoon jisse khud ko thoda theek rakh saku. Koi raasta hai kya theek hona chahti hoon main ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, <10 min options that don't add obligation but provide a safe outlet.
text: Yeh soch kar hi lagta hai ki aap apne bache ke liye sach mein ek mazboot saara hain. Abhi thodi raahat ke liye hum do choti chizein soch sakte hain: ya toh aap din mein sirf 10 minute akele nikal kar apne man ki ghutan ko ek diary mein likh lein, ya phir raat ko akele mein apne partner ko sirf ek normal message karke bache ki koi choti khabar share karein, bina kisi future discussion ke. Dono mein se kya theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Diary likhna zyada theek lag raha hai mujhe. Partner se abhi kuch bhi baat karungi toh aur emotional ho jaungi aur clear nahi hai aage kuch. Likhne se shayad mera apna dimaag thoda light ho jaye bina kisi ko pata chale.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the diary option step-by-step so it feels immediately actionable.
text: Diary wala option chunna bahut samajhdari ki baat hai. Pehle yeh karo ki raat ko jab bacha so jaye tab ek notebook aur pen nikalo... phir bas jo man mein aye, achha ya bura, usme bina darr ke likh do... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, raat ko mujhe koi tokne wala nahi hota. Din bhar toh khandaan aur papa ki baaton me time chala jata hai. Ek wahi aakhiri waqt hota hai jab main sach mein free hoti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the need for personal time as a structural necessity rather than a selfish act.
text: Humare yahan single mothers ke liye yeh bahut aam baat hai ki unka poora din dusron ke farz aur samaj ke darr mein nikal jata hai, isliye us raat ke akele waqt ko apne khud ke sakoon ke liye nikalna ekdum zaruri kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Mujhe apna dimaag theek rakhna hi padega agar bache ko achhi life deni hai toh. Ab us azaadi aur pyaar ka sapna toh waise bhi chhut chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her sacrifice of the new relationship for the sake of her child's security.
text: Apne bache ke ache bhavishya ke liye, aap apne us naye rishte ke khoobsurat sapne se bhi poori tarah peechhe hat rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Hatna hi pada na. Maine pichle kuch din se apne partner ko msg tak nahi kiya theek se. Wo bhi pareshan hain, par main unko bhi apni family ke is izzat wale drama me ghasit kar aur bura nahi karna chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her duty-bound decision to protect her partner and child from conflict.
text: Unki pareshani dekh kar bhi aap unhe is ghar ke bawaal se bachane aur sab kuch sambhalne ki poori zimmedari khud utha rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar main unse zyada touch me rahi toh papa ka gussa aur badhega. Uska sidha asar mere bache ki mental state pe padega. Mujhe in taano se use door rakhna hai bas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an actionable question to explore potential safe relational support.
text: In dono zimmedariyon ke beech jab aap bache ko safe rakhne ki koshish karti hain, toh kya khandaan mein koi ek bhi shaks hai jisse aap thodi madad ki umeed rakh sakti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, apne rishtedaron pe toh bilkul bharosa nahi kar sakti. Bas meri ek cousin sister hai jo dusre city me job karti hai, sirf usko mere is akelepan aur pressure ka thoda idea hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the presence of one safe relational connection despite the family pressure.
text: Baki sab ka darr hone ke bawajood, kam se kam aapki ek behen hai jiske paas aapse judi yeh sachai surakshit hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda mental support wo de deti hai message par, lekin main usko bhi roj phone karke negative baaton se thakana nahi chahti. Isliye diary me likhne wali baat hi sabse better approach lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the ongoing duration of her solitary emotional burden.
text: Aap baar-baar doosron ka dhyaan rakhne ke liye apni takleef ko zyada tar waqt apne tak hi simit rakhne ka faisla le rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maa hone ka yahi sabse bada hissa ban gaya hai ab. Par khair, yahan sari baatein clear share karke aaj sach mein dil ka thoda bojh halka zaroor lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming her resilience and normalizing the relief of sharing her burden.
text: Baat karke yeh thodi si shanti mehsoos hona yahi dikhata hai ki aap apne jazbaaton ko kitne samay se dabaye huye thin. Ek maa ke roop mein aapke andar sach mein in halaat ka samna karne ki bohut taqat hai, aur apna bojh halka karna usi taqat ko banaye rakhne ka tarika hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you mujhe samajhne ke liye. Papa ya family se umeed rakhna toh bekar hai, par main diary maintain karungi aur poora dhyan bache ko independent banane pe lagaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her renewed focus on her duty as a mother as a way to cope.
text: Ghar ke tanaav se apna dhyaan hatakar aap puri tarah se sirf ek behtar maa hone ka farz nibhane mein khud ko laga dena chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Usko kisi kabil bana diya toh khandaan ka muh apne aap hamesha ke liye band ho jayega. Abhi raat bhi kafi ho rahi hai, bache ke paas jaati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing her focus on her child's future as a structural anchor during family pressure.
text: Jab hum samaj aur rishton ke bojh tale dabe hote hain, toh bache jaisi choti umeed hume aage badhne ka sahi raasta dikhati hai, yeh koshish bilkul normal hai. Aap uski padhai ke liye jo theek soch rahi hain, wo aapko aage aur majboot banayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, yeh choti umeed hi kafi hai mere chalte rehne ke liye. Diary bhi pakka raat se start kar dungi main. Good night.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by gently mirroring her readiness to take the small step she chose.
text: Aapne aaj se aage badhne aur khud ke liye roz thoda waqt diary likhne ka mann pakka kar liya hai. Aap aur aapka bacha dono apna dhyaan rakhein, good night.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap unki har shart maan rahi hoon
text: Apne bacche ki chhat bachane ke liye main chup-chap unki har shart maan rahi hoon... Papa ne aaj decide kar liya ki mera inter-caste love marriage impossible hai. Wo mujhe aur mere bacche ko gaon bhej rahe hain taaki shaher ki badnaami se bacha ja sake, aur main bas asahay khadi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her relational sacrifice and helplessness without naming any anger towards her father.
text: Bacche ki khushi aur parivaar ke is faisle ke aage, aapko apne pyaar aur azadi dono se door jana pad raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine awaz uthayi toh mere bache ka aage ka support chhut jayega. Unhe lagta hai mere is inter-caste rishte ne unki umar bhar ki izzat par daag laga diya hai shaher mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shorter response with soft pause to gently hold space after the stigma cue regarding inter-caste marriage and badnaami.
text: Izzat khone ka yeh darr aapko aur bacche ko poori tarah se baandh raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap unki har shart maan rahi hoon
text: Puri tarah bandh chuki hoon main. Meri economic halat aisi nahi ki main unka virodh kar saku aur bache ko akele paal saku. Isliye chup-chap unki har shart maan rahi hoon, chahe andar se kitna bhi ghut rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting her duty as a mother and her financial dependency as the core drivers of her silence.
text: Ek maa hone ki zimmedari aur aarthik majboori aapko yeh ghutan sehne par majboor kar rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: chup-chap unki har shart maan rahi hoon
text: Wahi baat hai. Mere partner ne koshish ki thi baat karne ki, par papa ne dhamki de di. Ab gaon bhej dene ki tayari chal rahi hai aur main bas apne bacche ko dekh kar chup-chap unki har shart maan rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question to explore her internal emotional state beyond the logistics of the situation.
text: Is saari ghutan ke beech jab aapko shahar chhod kar gaon jaane ke liye kaha ja raha hai, toh aapko akelepan mein andar se kaisa lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot bhari guilt hota hai. Main apni life me pyar chah rahi thi, aur badle mein mujhe lagta hai ki meri wajah se ab mere bacche ka future kharab ho jayega us gaon ke mahol mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific feeling of being trapped and helpless in her duty to her child versus her family's demands.
text: Aisa lagta hai ki aap apne bacche ki bhalai aur khandaan ke niyamon ke beech poori tarah se phans chuki hain, aur ekdum laachar mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Laachar hi toh hoon. Agar virodh kiya toh na bache ke paas ghar rahega na khane ko paise. Mujhe apni khushiyan bhoolni hi padengi uski chhat bachane ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing her feelings of helplessness as a culturally common burden placed on dependent single mothers in the Hindi belt.
text: Humare samaj mein aarthik taur par nirbhar auraton aur maaon par parivaar ki izzat ka bojh is tarah daal diya jata hai ki aapka khud ko phansa hua aur bebas mehsoos karna ekdum swabhavik hai, isme aapka koi dosh nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par sab mujhe hi doshi mante hain ki maine inter-caste shadi ka socha hi kyun. Kabhi kabhi sochti hoon ki kya main sach mein itni buri maa hoon jo apne bacche par yeh din la rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the continuous duration and weight of her self-blame.
text: Pichle bohut waqt se aap aatm-glani aur khud par uthne wale sawaalon ka yeh bhari bojh akele hi apne kandhon par dhoti aa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur ab toh packing bhi shuru ho gayi hai gaon jane ki. Wahan ke log pehle hi baatein banate hain. Mujhe lagta hai mera wajood hi khatam ho jayega bas sabki sunte sunte.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a brief systemic anecdote about how common this is for dependent mothers, to reduce her isolation.
text: Dependent single mothers ke mamle mein yeh pattern bohut aam hai—sirf aapke sath aisa nahi ho raha, lekin koi is par khul kar bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein badnaami ka darr sabse bada hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Badnaami ka darr hi toh papa ko gaon bhej raha hai humein lekar. Agar hum yahan shaher me rehte toh shayad aage jaake main koi choti moti job kar ke akele stand le sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her feared consequence of losing her future financial independence and opportunities by moving to the village.
text: Gaon jane se aapke bacche ki achhi parvarish aur aapki aarthik azadi dono ke raste poori tarah band ho jane ka darr aapko sata raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Agar mere paas thode paise hote toh main apne bacche ko lekar alag se survive kar leti. Par ab unke diye paiso aur chhat par nirbhar rehna meri bebasi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her relational dependency as a barrier to leaving the family structure.
text: Jab tak aap aarthik roop se khud par nirbhar nahi hain, tab tak khandaan ke is faisle ko bina kuch kahe swikar karna ek bohut badi majboori ban chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Majboori toh hai... bas kabhi kabhi dar lagta hai ki baccha us rural mahol mein kaisa bada hoga. Usko ye sab discrimination nahi dekhna chahiye tha meri wajah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her primary focus on her duty to protect her child's future.
text: Bacche ke kal ki fikar aur uski bhalai ka khayal, aapke apne aaj ke iss gehre dukh se bhi kahin jyada bada lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut bada hai. Par main waqt aane par uske liye ladungi zarur. Abhi toh kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... mujhe thoda strong rehna hai uske liye, batao kya karoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable actions to help her feel a bit grounded while packing, preserving her hope.
text: Apne bacche ke liye itna sab sehna sach mein aapki himmat dikhata hai. Abhi khud ko thoda sambhalne ke liye do choti cheezein kar sakte hain: ya toh aap ek kagaz par apni aage ki job skills likh kar chhupa lein taki ummeed bani rahe, ya phir packing karte waqt roz 10 minute sirf apne akelepan mein chupchap baith kar thoda saans lein. Dono mein se kya sahi lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kagaz par job skills likhne wala idea theek hai. Kam se kam isse mujhe yaad rahega ki mere paas thodi bahut padhai hai aur main aage ja kar kuch kar sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen action into simple, immediate steps.
text: Pehle ek choti si notebook ya kagaz nikal lijiye... phir usme aaraam se apni wo saari skills likhiye jo aap gaon mein reh kar bhi kisi tarah refine kar sakti hain... bas itna hi kijiye aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, maine pehle baccho ko thoda tuition padhaya hua hai. Gaon mein bhi shayad wahan ke kisi bache ko chupke se padha saku thoda bohut.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her effort to hold onto her skills as a vital structural step toward long-term independence.
text: Is tarah ke halaat mein auraton ke liye aisi choti choti skills hi unka aage badhne ka sahara banti hain, yeh aapki aarthik azadi ki taraf ek bohut normal aur zaruri kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Shayad isse mera dhyan in taano aur dhamkiyon se thoda hatt jaye. Packing karni pad rahi hai mujhe abhi, ek ek cheez uthate hue bohut rona aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the painful process of dismantling her life and relational ties to the city.
text: Packing karte waqt har ek samaan ke sath aapki un purani yaadon aur ummeedon ka chhutna aapko andar tak dukhi kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Purani yaadein... apne us partner ki yaadein bhi. Sab pichhe chhut jayega ab. Ab mera astitva sirf aur sirf ek maa tak seemit reh jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her total commitment to her duty as a mother after the loss of her other identities.
text: Saari umeedon ke tootne ke baad bhi, aap ek maa ka apna farz poori nishtha ke sath nibhane ka dridh nishchay kar chuki hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Nishchay toh karna hi tha. Bacche ka chehra jab dekhti hoon toh sab dukh ek pal ke liye door ho jata hai. Meri wajah se use kyu takleef ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her belief that enduring this will prevent negative consequences for her child.
text: Aapko lagta hai ki agar aap chup chap ye sab bardasht karti rahin, toh kam se kam aapka baccha aage aane wali mushkilon se bach jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas yahi ek aakhiri rasta bacha hai... warna is samaj aur meri inter-caste mohabbat ne toh mujhe kahin ka nahi chhora.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Short response reflecting relational isolation, soft pause after stigma cue.
text: Samaj ke is bhedbhav ne aapko poori tarah akela kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Akeli hoon par phir bhi main survive kar lungi. Aaj raat ko hi wo paper wali list banaungi apni skills ki. Ye list mere akelepan me kaam aayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the duration of her struggle and how this small step gives her relief.
text: Itne dino ki lambaayi aur ghutan ke baad, apni kaabiliyat ko phir se yaad karna aapko thodi raahat de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, sahi me thodi rahat mili hai ye sab aapse share kar ke. Ab main aage badhti hoon, packing bhi poori karni hai aur bacche ko sulana hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ending by validating her duty as a mother preparing for the future.
text: Aapne aane wale kal ko sanwarne ke liye apna poora dhyaan aur zimmedari bakhubi utha rakhi hai... apna aur bacche ka achhe se dhyan rakhiyega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khushi aur aawaz dono daba kar bas unke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon
text: Papa ne aaj achanak faisla suna diya ki wo mere bacche ko mere purane sasural walo ko saunp denge kyunki mera dusre religion mein love marriage karna unke samaj ko manzoor nahi hai. Ye sunkar meri rooh kaanp gayi, par unke samman aur community exclusion ke darr se, ek buri aurat ka tag lagne se bachne ke liye main apni khushi aur aawaz dono daba kar bas unke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the Seeker's helplessness and silencing of self to maintain family ties.
text: Aapke apne parivaar ke is bade faisle ne aapko is kadar bebas kar diya hai, jahan aapke paas apne haq mein kuch kehne ki gunjaish hi nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Gunjaish kahan chhori hai kisine? Ek dusre religion wale se pyaar kya kar liya, jaise maine koi sangeen jurm kar diya ho. Ab agar main bacche ko na bhejti, toh mujhe poori tarah se uss buri aurat ka tag de dete jo parivaar ki izzat kha gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shorter response reflecting the feared consequence of the stigma cue, ending with a soft pause.
text: Ek 'buri aurat' kehlane ka aur samaj se poori tarah nikaale jane ka darr aapko jhakjhor raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khushi aur aawaz dono daba kar bas unke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon
text: Haan, main akele is sabka samna nahi kar sakti thi. Aur ab wo mere bacche ko wapas mere purane sasural walo ko de rahe hain! Par aarthik roop se dependent hone ke karan, main bas apni khushi aur aawaz dono daba kar bas unke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her duty-based conflict between wanting to keep her child and her financial dependence on the family.
text: Apne bache ko apne paas rakhne ki maa ki chahat aur aarthik majboori ne aapko khamoshi aur dukh sehne par majboor kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dukh toh bohut bada hai. Par papa ki izzat aur unka samman bachana bhi zaroori hai, varna log unhe jeene nahi denge. Mujhe lagta hai mere bacche ke bina meri zindagi poori sookhi ho jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the internal emotional impact of the impending separation from her child.
text: Is poore darr ke mahaul mein, jab itne chote bacche se door jane ki baat tasveer ban rahi hai, toh aapko akele mein andar hi andar kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohut sharam aati hai khud par. Lagta hai jaise mere naye pyaar ki aur naye religion wale rishte ki keemat mere us masoom bacche ko apni maa se door ho kar chukani pad rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the ongoing duration and heavy burden of her self-blame.
text: Jab se yeh sab shuru hua hai, aap khud ko is bhari sharam aur lagatar chalti aa rahi dosh ki bhavna tale daba hua mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dosh toh mera hi hai na kahin na kahin. Agar main parivaar aur samaj ke rules ke hisaab se chalti, toh papa ko community exclusion ka darr nahi hota. Wo bas apne khandaan ko is sharam se bachana chahte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing deeper into her fears about the child's future while she protects her father's motives.
text: Jab aap akelepan mein in saari baaton ke baare mein sochti hain, toh purane sasural mein bacche ke aage ke jeewan ko lekar kya khayal aate hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khushi aur aawaz dono daba kar bas unke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon
text: Khayal yahi aata hai ki main apne bacche ke liye kuch bhi nahi kar paayi... mera pyaar uski judai le aayega ye maine nahi socha tha. Isliye ab main apni khushi aur aawaz dono daba kar bas unke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon, bas is umeed me ki wahan uspe koi aanch na aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific feeling of being trapped between her love/child and family's honor.
text: Lagta hai ki aap apne bacche ke pyaar aur apne khandaan ke samman ki is ladayi ke beech ekdum buri tarah phans gayi hain, aur poori tarah se laachar mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohut buri tarah phansi hoon. Na main piche hat sakti hoon aur na hi aage akele apne bacche ka kharch utha sakti hoon. Samaj aur samman ke in bandhano ne mujhe andar se khokhla kar diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing her feelings as a structural pressure placed on women in her cultural context.
text: Humare samaj mein auraton par khandaan ki izzat aur samman ka itna bada bojh daala jata hai ki aapka akele is vajah se khud ko itna thaka hua aur laachar mehsoos karna ekdum swabhavik hai, is poori situation mein aapki koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad koi galti na ho, par jab ladki dusre religion mein shadi karne ki soche, tab sab log aakar uska character assassinate karte hain. Uss nazar se dekhne par lagta hai jaise main sach mein bohut gandi aurat hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Restating the isolation stemming from the stigma, with a soft pause.
text: Bina kisi support ke akele un tano aur bhedbhav ko jhelna aapko apno se aur bhi zyada door aur akela kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Akeli hi hoon main. Pehle sasural mein akeli padi rahi, aur ab is nayi zindagi ki chah mein apne iklaute bacche ko kho rahi hoon. Mujhe toh ek maa hone ka adhikaar tak mehsoos nahi hota ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to reduce isolation without offering a solution.
text: Dependent single mothers ke cases mein yeh pattern bahut common hai—sirf aapke sath aisi halat nahi ho rahi, lekin koi in cheezon par khul kar bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein badnaami ka darr sabse bada rakha jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul sahi keh rahe ho. Badnaami ka darr hi toh papa se ye sab faisle karwa raha hai. Main unki saalo ki banayi izzat apni ek chahat ke liye mitti mein thodi mila sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the consequence of preserving family honor through her sacrifice.
text: Apne parivaar ki izzat bachane ki is koshish mein, aapko apne masoom bache se alag hone ka darr aur bhari dukh akele uthana pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dukh toh bahut bhari hai... par abhi toh usko bhejney ki taiyari karni hai. Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, dimaag sunn pad gaya hai... aakhir main kya karoon abhi, bas lagaatar rona aa raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable actions to help her stay grounded in the moment.
text: Is bhari samay mein aapki ghutn aur yeh rona ekdum samajh aata hai. Abhi khud ko thoda sambhalne ke liye do chote kadam hain: ya toh aap apne bache ke kuch kapde ek bag mein dheere-dheere pack kar lein taaki aap ek waqt par ek hi kaam sochein, ya bas 5 minute aankh band karke lambi saans lein. Inme se kya theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main 5 minute lambi saans lena hi chahungi... kyuki abhi uske kapde dekh kar pack karne ki himmat nahi ho rahi mujhme, hath kaanp rahe hain mere.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the breathing exercise into an immediate, simple step.
text: Pehle ek shaant kone mein aaram se baith jayiye... phir dhire se apni aankhein band kijiye aur ek gehri saans andar lijiye... bas itna hi kijiye aaj aur abhi ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda saans liya maine. Pata nahi, kya mere bache ki zindagi kabhi is trauma se theek hogi? Aur meri aawaz jo humesha ke liye yahan dab gayi hai... kya wo theek hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her silence as a product of a patriarchal structure, not a personal failure.
text: Aise mahaul mein khud ko aur apni aawaz ko chup rakhna, khas kar jab aarthik nirbharta na ho, yeh aapki koi kamzori nahi hai, balki yeh is patriarchal samaj ka ek dhaancha hai jahan auraton ko control karna hi norm banaya gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Structure kharab hai samaj ka ye ab dheere dheere samajh aane laga hai. Abhi main usko purane sasural jane se nahi rok sakti, par main is condition ke baad thodi strong ho ke, usse milne ka haq kabhi na kabhi zaroor mangungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift toward a long-term duration of hope despite current submission.
text: Lamba safar tay karna hai aapko, par aaj is lambi khamoshi mein bhi aapne aage chal kar bacche se jude rehne ki ek mazboot umeed dekhi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni khushi aur aawaz dono daba kar bas unke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon
text: Haan, umeed toh rakhni hi padegi warna main mar jaungi. Ek maa hoon main aakhir. Mana ki aaj apni khushi aur aawaz dono daba kar bas unke aage sir jhukaye khadi hoon, par main humesha aise harkar nahi baithungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her deep sense of maternal duty powering her endurance.
text: Maa hone ki zimmedari aapko aaj is dukh aur bebasi ko sehne ki taqat de rahi hai, taaki kal aap thoda waqt badalne par apne adhikaar ke liye dobara khadi ho sakein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad wahi taqat mujhe zinda rakhi hui hai. Papa chahte hain ki main samaj ki izzat ke liye chup rahun, aur main apni is khamoshi ko apne bacche ke future ke badle ka sauda maan rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational paradox of her silence vs her father's motives.
text: Aapka apne bache ke prati gehra pyar aur aapke pita ka us samman aur samaj ka darr, dono ek hi khamoshi mein alag-alag wajahon se base hue hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat keh rahe hain aap. Aapse ye sab bol kar mujhe thoda halka lag raha hai abhi. Ab main ja kar apne bacche ke paas baithti hoon. Raat bahut lambi baaki hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledging the feared difficulty of the impending night while noting her calmness.
text: Aage ke is waqt ka darr abhi bhi hai, par is aane wali lambi raat ka saamna karne ke liye aapne khud ko thoda mazboot zaroor kiya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, bas usko theek se dekhti rahungi jab tak wo so nahi jata. Aage jo hoga wo theek se dekhenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by reflecting her immediate maternal duty.
text: Ek chinta karne wali maa ki tarah is pal aap sirf aur sirf apne bacche ke sakoon ka dhyan rakhna chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bilkul. Shukriya mujhe bina judge kiye sunne ke liye. Akele mein aur tano ke beech ye sari baatein main kahin nahi keh pati thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the meaningful relational connection she found in opening up.
text: Is akelepan ki raat mein is tarah apne dil ka bojh khol kar halka karna ek bohut bada kadam tha... aapna aur apne bacche ka is muskhil ghadi mein aaram se dhyan rakhiyega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai
text: Mere love marriage ke proposal ko caste mismatch bolkar thukrane ke baad, Papa ne aaj bina meri marzi sune ek aurat chhod chuke aadmi se mera rishta pakka kar diya kyunki wo dowry nahi maang rahe. Main apni bachi ke future ke liye pareshan hoon, par apne pita ke samne bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai. 'Log kya kahenge' aur parivaar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye main khamoshi se apni bali chadha rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict between obeying her father and protecting her daughter.
text: Aapke pita ne bina aapse pooche jo achanak faisla liya hai, usne aapko aisi bebas halat mein daal diya hai jahan parivaar ki shanti aur bachi ki suraksha ke beech aap khud ko akela pa rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur mere paas option hi kya hai? Ek toh main pehle se hi akele apni bachi pal rahi hoon. Agar main samaj ki baat nahi manungi, toh log tana marenge ki dekho single maa hokar abhi bhi nakhre dikha rahi hai, iska ghar waise bhi nai basna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shorter response reflecting the feared consequence of societal stigma, ending softly.
text: Logon ke aise kathor taano ka darr aur badnaami ki chinta aapko andar hi andar rok rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai
text: Bilkul. Meri choti bachi hai, uski aage ki zindagi par in sab baaton ka kya asar padega? Aur agar main us aadmi se shadi kar loon jo pehle hi patni chhod chuka hai, toh meri bachi wahan safe rahegi ya nahi... par Papa ke aage bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the internal impact of her constant worry about her daughter's future.
text: Bachi ke aane wale kal ki aisi gehri chinta aur darr ke beech, aap akele khud ko kaise sambhal rahi hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhal kahan pa rahi hoon? Bas akele mein rote rehti hoon andar hi andar. Ek taraf mera pyar ka sapna tuta kyunki caste mismatch tha, aur dusri taraf unki samaj mein izzat ka bhari bojh.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific feeling of being trapped between her own desires, her child's safety, and family honor.
text: Lagta hai jaise aap apne toote sapnon, bachi ki suraksha aur Papa ki izzat ki apekshaon ke beech poori tarah phans gayi hain, aur is akelepan mein bahut laachar mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Kabhi kabhi gussa aata hai Papa par, ki wo meri aur meri bachi ki khushi se zyada dowry bachane par dhyan de rahe hain. Lekin main unka samman karti hoon, isliye chup reh kar sehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her near-anger into the duty and impossibility she herself imposes.
text: Pita ke faisle se gehra dukh zaroor hai, par ek achi beti hone ka farz aur samman aapko woh sab bhula kar khamosh rehne par majboor kar raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Achi beti bante bante main shayad ek achi maa nahi ban pa rahi. Bachi ka masoom chehra dekhti hoon toh bahut guilt hota hai. Main usko ek safe ghar nahi de pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to reduce isolation without offering a solution.
text: Maa hone ke farz aur parivaar ke daayre mein aisi ghutan bahut common hai—sirf tumhara akele ka sangharsh nahi hai yeh, lekin khul kar koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein auraton se bas aisi khamoshi ki hi umeed ki jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Khamosh na rahungi toh log sidha character par ungli uthayenge. Bolenge ki akele rehne wali aurat parivaar ki naak katwa rahi hai aur love marriage ke piche pagal hai. Ye soch kar hi himmat poori toot jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the isolation stemming from the stigma cue, ending with a soft pause.
text: Dusron ke in chubhne wale taano ka darr aapko apno se aur samaj se dono se door, bilkul akela kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aur is sab akelepan mein Papa us anjaan aadmi ko acha maan rahe hain, bina ye pariksha kiye ki usne apni pehli patni kyun chhodi. Meri toh jaise koi value hi nahi bachi is ghar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the ongoing duration and heavy burden of being treated as a compromise.
text: Jab se yeh naya rishta tay hua hai, aap khud ko bas ek bejaan saude ki tarah dekhne lagi hain, jiska lamba bojh aap lagatar akele dhoti ja rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai
text: Lagaatar bojh dhote dhote sach mein thak gayi hoon ab. Na bachi ko us anjaan aadmi ke ghar le jana safe lag raha hai, na peeche hatne ka rasta dikh raha hai. Bas khamoshi se sehne ki aadat ho gayi hai, bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing deeper into her specific fears about her daughter's future while she submits to the family.
text: Bachi ko lekar yeh khatre ka khayal aapke dil par kya asar daalta hai, jab aap akele mein uske aane wale waqt ke baare mein sochti hain?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai
text: Main nahi chahti ki wo is darr aur dabaav mein badi ho. Agar main aaj laachar rahi, toh kal usko bhi yahi sikhna padega ki aurat ka kaam bas chup rehna hai. Par bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai. Main poori tarah fans chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing her exhaustion and feelings of being trapped as a structural pressure placed on single mothers.
text: Apni bachi ke future ke liye is kadar pareshan hona aapki koi kamzori nahi, balki ek maa ka sabse sacha pyar hai. Humare yahan single mothers par izzat ka itna bojh hota hai ki aapka khud ko fasa hua aur thaka hua mehsoos karna ekdum swabhavik hai, isme aapka koi dosh nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe hain. Hum ladkiyon ko bachpan se yahi ghol kar pilaya jata hai ki hamesha yahi socho ki 'log kya kahenge'. Par meri bachi bhi toh ek ladki hai, kya uski aage ki zindagi bhi aisi hi darr darr ke nikal jayegi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her profound trapped and exhausted state regarding her child's fate.
text: Sach mein aap samaj ke darr aur bachi ke behtar aane wale kal ki umeed ke beech buri tarah se fansi hui, thaki aur laachar mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thak chuki hoon main apne farz aur sabka dhyan rakhte rakhte. Par main aise hi haar man kar nahi baith sakti. Kuch toh karna hoga jisse bachi kam se kam safe rahe. Par ab kya karoon, kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka dimaag sunn hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable actions to help her stay grounded and calm her mind.
text: Aapke is thakan bhare pal mein raasta na milna bilkul theek hai. Abhi ke liye do choti cheezein kar sakte hain: ya toh ek paper par sirf apni aur bachi ki safety se judi 2 zaroori baatein likh lijiye, ya sirf 5 minute ke liye apni bachi ke sath aaram se baith kar ek lambi saans lijiye. Inme se kya abhi aapke liye behtar lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Paper par likhne ki takat nahi hai abhi dimaag mein. Main bas apni bachi ke paas ja kar thodi der shanti se baith kar lambi saans lena chahti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into a simple, immediate step.
text: Toh sabse pehle dheere se uthiye aur apni bachi ke paas jaiye... uske pas shanti se baith kar bas ek gehri saans andar lijiye... aaj aur abhi ke liye bas itna hi karna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Uske paas hone se mujhe hamesha himmat milti hai. Thoda shant lag raha hai dimaag aapse baat karke. Main soch rahi hoon ki us aadmi ke baare mein chupchap pata lagwane ki koshish karoon kisi bharosemand insan se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her idea as a sensible, culturally appropriate way for a mother to protect her child covertly.
text: Apni aur bachi ki suraksha ke bare mein aage ki soch kar chupchap jaankari jutana ek fikar mand maa ka bilkul sahi hak hai. Aksar aisi jaldbaazi ki shadiyon mein sachai chupayi jati hai, isliye apne hisaab se surakshit kadam uthana bahut zaroori hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Unke aage sidhe taur par bagawat karne ki himmat mujhme nahi hai, par ek maa hone ka farz toh apne tareeqe se main zaroor nibhaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her deep sense of maternal duty driving this protective action.
text: Sidhe ladne ke bajaye, aap ek maa ki gehri zimmedari lete hue chupchap apne aur apni bachi ke surakshit kal ke liye ek mazboot kadam uthane ko tayar hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Caste mismatch aur dowry ke chakar mein meri apni khushi chahe khatam ho gayi, par meri bachi ki zindagi main dao par nahi lagne dungi. Main kisi bhi tarah Papa se thoda aur waqt maang lungi is rishte par sochne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift toward a long-term duration of hope despite her immediate submission.
text: Thoda aur waqt maang kar, aap is lambe mushkil daur mein sachai pata lagane aur khud ko sambhalne ka ek naya mauka dhoondh rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas wahi waqt chahiye mujhe. Agar us aadmi ki sachai galat nikli, toh mere paas Papa ke samne mana karne ki ek thos wajah hogi, fir unhe aakhir meri baat manni padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the consequence of preserving family honor while protecting her child through proof.
text: Agar woh rishta sahi nahi nikla, toh us thos wajah ke sahare aap parivaar ke is shadi ke dabaav ko bina bagawat kiye rok payengi, is umeed ke sath aap apne kadam aage badha rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ek umeed toh jagi hai. Ajeeb si ghutan ho rahi thi akele ye sab jhelte hue. Aapse baat karke mujhe apne dil ka rasta thoda saaf nazar aaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing her earlier confusion as a product of patriarchal family structures, not a personal failure.
text: Jab parivaar ki izzat ka pura dabaav auraton par akele daal diya jata hai, toh rasta dhoondhna dhundhla aur darawana ho jata hai, aur baatein baant kar us dhund ko thoda saaf karna aapka bilkul zaroori hak hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne meri ek single maa hone ki is uljhan ko bohut ache se samjha aur himmat di. Ab main bas jakar apni bachi ko theek se sula deti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the meaningful relational connection she is returning to.
text: Apne dil ka akelepan aur bojh aapse baant kar halka karne ke baad, ab aap apna saara pyar aur dhyan sirf apni bachi ke sukoon par dena chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Aaj ki raat kam se kam main rone ke bajaye apne aur uske aane wale kal ke bare mein shanti se soch sakungi. Shukriya mera sath dene ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by reflecting her immediate maternal duty and strength.
text: Ek bahadur maa ki tarah is pal ko poori tarah apni bachi ke pyare kal ke naam karna, aapki sachhi taqat ko dikhata hai... aap apna bhi aaram se dhyan rakhiyega.
